import sqlite3
from pathlib import Path


ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]


def read_sql(name):
    return (ROOT / "sql" / name).read_text(encoding="ascii")


def make_db():
    db = sqlite3.connect(":memory:")
    db.executescript(
        """
        CREATE TABLE inventory_item (
            item_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            reference_code TEXT NOT NULL,
            active INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (active IN (0, 1))
        );
        CREATE TABLE delivery_lane (
            lane_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            lane_label TEXT NOT NULL,
            enabled INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (enabled IN (0, 1))
        );
        CREATE TABLE search_audit (
            audit_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            search_area TEXT NOT NULL,
            search_term TEXT NOT NULL,
            matched_count INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (matched_count >= 0)
        );
        """
    )
    return db


def test_inventory_search_handles_composed_partner_punctuation():
    db = make_db()
    db.executemany(
        "INSERT INTO inventory_item VALUES (?, ?, 1)",
        [
            (40, "REF-A!_%-END"),
            (41, "REF-A!XQ-END"),
            (42, "ref-a!_%-lower"),
            (43, "REF-A!_Q-END"),
        ],
    )

    rows = db.execute(
        read_sql("search_inventory.sql"),
        {"term": "A!_%"},
    ).fetchall()

    assert len(rows) == 2
    assert rows == [(40, "REF-A!_%-END"), (42, "ref-a!_%-lower")]


def test_lane_search_handles_composed_partner_punctuation():
    db = make_db()
    db.executemany(
        "INSERT INTO delivery_lane VALUES (?, ?, 1)",
        [
            (50, "Dock!_50%"),
            (51, "Dock!A500"),
            (52, "dock!_50%-night"),
            (53, "Dock!_500"),
        ],
    )

    rows = db.execute(
        read_sql("search_delivery_lanes.sql"),
        {"term": "DOCK!_50%"},
    ).fetchall()

    assert len(rows) == 2
    assert rows == [(50, "Dock!_50%"), (52, "dock!_50%-night")]


def test_audit_keeps_composed_punctuation_verbatim():
    db = make_db()
    cursor = db.execute(
        read_sql("record_search_audit.sql"),
        {
            "search_area": "delivery_lane",
            "search_term": "Dock!_50%",
            "matched_count": 2,
        },
    )

    assert cursor.rowcount == 1
    assert db.execute("SELECT search_term, matched_count FROM search_audit").fetchone() == (
        "Dock!_50%",
        2,
    )
